name: Stuffed Zuchinni
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the top off each zucchini and scoop out the seeds.
2. Mix the chopped onion with breadcrumbs, grated Parmesan cheese, minced garlic, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
3. Stuff the hollowed-out zucchinis with the onion mixture.
4. Place the stuffed zucchinis on a baking sheet and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes or until tender.
